policy_text: Employees are eligible for 18 paid leaves per calendar year.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR001
Category: Leave Policy
Policy Title: Annual Leave
Policy Details: Employees are eligible for 18 paid leaves per calendar year.

policy_text: Employees can carry forward up to 5 unused annual leaves to the next calendar year.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR002
Category: Leave Policy
Policy Title: Leave Carry Forward
Policy Details: Employees can carry forward up to 5 unused annual leaves to the next calendar year.

policy_text: Employees are eligible for 7 sick leaves per calendar year. Sick leave should be informed to the manager as soon as possible.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR003
Category: Leave Policy
Policy Title: Sick Leave
Policy Details: Employees are eligible for 7 sick leaves per calendar year. Sick leave should be informed to the manager as soon as possible.

policy_text: Planned leave must be applied at least 5 working days in advance and approved by the reporting manager.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR004
Category: Leave Policy
Policy Title: Leave Approval
Policy Details: Planned leave must be applied at least 5 working days in advance and approved by the reporting manager.

policy_text: Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week with prior approval from their reporting manager.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR005
Category: Work From Home Policy
Policy Title: WFH Eligibility
Policy Details: Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week with prior approval from their reporting manager.

policy_text: Employees working from home must be available on official communication channels during working hours.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR006
Category: Work From Home Policy
Policy Title: WFH Availability
Policy Details: Employees working from home must be available on official communication channels during working hours.

policy_text: Employees travelling for business must get travel approval before booking tickets.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR007
Category: Travel Policy
Policy Title: Domestic Travel
Policy Details: Employees travelling for business must get travel approval before booking tickets.

policy_text: Employees must submit travel reimbursement claims with valid bills within 7 days of trip completion.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR008
Category: Travel Policy
Policy Title: Travel Reimbursement
Policy Details: Employees must submit travel reimbursement claims with valid bills within 7 days of trip completion.

policy_text: Meal expenses during business travel can be claimed up to the approved daily limit with valid receipts.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR009
Category: Expense Policy
Policy Title: Meal Expenses
Policy Details: Meal expenses during business travel can be claimed up to the approved daily limit with valid receipts.

policy_text: Employees working remotely may claim internet reimbursement as per company-approved monthly limit.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR010
Category: Expense Policy
Policy Title: Internet Reimbursement
Policy Details: Employees working remotely may claim internet reimbursement as per company-approved monthly limit.

policy_text: Employees must serve a notice period of 60 days after resignation unless otherwise approved by HR.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR011
Category: Notice Period Policy
Policy Title: Notice Period
Policy Details: Employees must serve a notice period of 60 days after resignation unless otherwise approved by HR.

policy_text: Employees must not share confidential company or customer information with unauthorized persons.
search_text:
Policy ID: HR012
Category: Code of Conduct
Policy Title: Confidential Information
Policy Details: Employees must not share confidential company or customer information with unauthorized persons.

policy_text: Employees are expected to maintain professional and respectful behavior with colleagues, customers, and partners.
search_text:

Category: Code of Conduct
Policy Title: Workplace Behavior
Policy Details: Employees are expected to maintain professional and respectful behavior with colleagues, customers, and partners.
